# Golden Go fixtures whose module caches are baked into the union image
# (item 5.1, #268; see docs/v2/phase_1/design_cost_latency.md). One line per
# fixture: <name> <owner/repo> <commit>. Keep in sync with the [fixture]
# pins in benchmark/stories/*.toml. REPUBLISH WHEN THE IMAGE NO LONGER COVERS
# the current pins, as `make cache-verify` determines — coverage is the trigger,
# not the pin string, so a re-pin the image still covers keeps the existing
# digest in configs/*.toml. (Amended 2026-07-22, PROPOSED pending acceptance;
# see design_cost_latency.md.) The check proves COVERAGE, not input equality:
# a shrinking dependency set still verifies, which is correct — the image is a
# sufficient superset. Never skip the check on the argument that a change
# 'looks harmless'.
cms  SnapdragonPartners/golden-fixture-cms   748681e3ba581c2853b5e7fcd8ff6a0ca06d5f3b
llms SnapdragonPartners/golden-fixture-llms  7729fffe3f2a15b97de6ba8dd73273fd562fad0d
chat SnapdragonPartners/golden-fixture-chat  60e79fd075c8f3f13d7c8650012a2fc74f77de4a
